creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232863
devel/go-perf: update to 0.0.0-20220325170245

This update adds the benchseries command for analysing series of
benchmarks over the long term development of a project.

I intend this to be the version for 2022Q2.  If the branch has already been branched off by the time this PR is processed, please MFH.

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.

No changelog as this project has no tagged releases yet.
